text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hola! Someone called me, so here I am! It's me, El
Condor Pasaaa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hmm... So who called me over here?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ah... The statue of the Three Goddesses?
